task_completion.description: Create the systemd service file named 'veracrypt-media.service'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a text editor (like nano or vim) or a command (like cat or echo) creating a file at '/etc/systemd/system/veracrypt-media.service' (or similar systemd path).

task_completion.description: Configure the service file with the correct VeraCrypt mount command, volume, keyfile, and mount point
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the service file must show a command executing 'veracrypt' with the volume '/home/ga/Volumes/media_vault.hc', the keyfile '/home/ga/Keyfiles/media_server.key', and the mount point '/mnt/media_vault'. It should also indicate no password (e.g., -p "" or --password="").

task_completion.description: Enable the service to start automatically
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of 'systemctl enable veracrypt-media.service' and the resulting 'Created symlink' output.

task_completion.description: Start the service and verify it is running
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'systemctl start veracrypt-media.service' followed by 'systemctl status veracrypt-media.service' displaying an 'Active: active' or 'Active: active (exited)' status.

task_completion.description: Verify the volume is mounted and data is accessible
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command like 'ls /mnt/media_vault' with the output displaying 'catalog.csv', proving the volume is successfully mounted and accessible.

integrity.description: The agent actually interacted with systemd rather than faking terminal output
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard systemctl output formatting and authentic shell prompts, ensuring the agent didn't just echo the expected success messages.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely accessed the mounted volume rather than faking the file
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the agent did not use commands like 'touch /mnt/media_vault/catalog.csv' or 'echo catalog.csv' to fake the presence of the expected file.

integrity.description: The agent did not use the VeraCrypt GUI to manually mount the volume
integrity.visual_evidence: The VeraCrypt graphical user interface should not be used to mount the volume; the mounting must be handled entirely by the systemd service.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected service name is 'veracrypt-media.service'. The volume path is '/home/ga/Volumes/media_vault.hc'. The keyfile path is '/home/ga/Keyfiles/media_server.key'. The mount point is '/mnt/media_vault'. The volume contains a file named 'catalog.csv', which should be visible when successfully mounted.
